_note: Synthetic Pass 2 positioned analysis output for testing. Mix of supported and unsupported claims.

claims.claim_text: Participants consistently struggled to articulate their distress, suggesting an underlying experience of shame around help-seeking.
The anticipation of not being understood functioned as a relational barrier to disclosure.
Participants universally reported feeling judged by all professional services they encountered.
Moments of felt attunement were described through embodied language, including references to breathing and physical relief.
Ambivalence about needing help was expressed through paradoxical constructions.
